title: MAHATRANSCO Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 06 Apprenticeship Posts
description: Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Company (MAHATRANSCO) has released an official recruitment notification for 2026. To fulfill the 06 vacancies for Apprenticeship Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the 10th Pass or ITI can grab this chance and apply for these posts. However, interested candidates with the essential qualification can apply for the MAHATRANSCO Notification 2026 on or before the last date of application. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs...
